acceptance_criteria: Workbook is parseable in grader environment or a formulas-export is attached
cleaning_plan.md contains cell-level citations for all computed fields
A reproducibility artifact (CSV or script) reproduces the evidence table when executed
extra_model_fields.estimated_effort: Low to moderate (regenerate workbook/export formulas, update cleaning_plan.md, and attach small reproducibility script or CSV).
extra_model_fields.expected_benefit: Improved semantic verification and reproducibility; likely increase in semantic score to full credit if formulas are visible and cell-level citations are complete.

planned_changes: Provide a parseable workbook: regenerate membrane_fouling_index.xlsx ensuring compatibility with common parsers (or include an exported 'Formulas' worksheet saved as CSV/plain-text that lists the exact formulas used in each computed column).

In cleaning_plan.md add explicit spreadsheet cell references for each computed value reported in the evidence table (predicted_sdi, sdi_residual, sdi_residual_pct, fouling_index, priority_score and budget_used calculation).

Add a reproducibility section with step-by-step calculations: show the formula expressions, the sensitivity_shift_pct application, and a worked example for one record (include exact cell addresses and numeric substitution).
Include an exported CSV of computed columns (or a short Python notebook/script) that when run reproduces the evidence table; attach the script to the revised submission.
Update the 'Unresolved assumptions' section to either justify or remove assumptions that affect calculation steps, and explicitly document scaling/normalization choices used in priority_score.
Re-run deterministic precheck and include any relevant logs or 'deterministic_precheck' output references in the revision so graders can quickly confirm artifact parseability.
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Partial semantic credit resulted from inability to inspect spreadsheet formulas (openpyxl_unavailable) and absence of explicit cell-level citations in cleaning_plan.md; fix will improve reproducibility and allow full verification.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Artifacts present and deliverable contract satisfied (deterministic precheck passed). Semantic grader gave partial credit (0.75) because the XLSX workbook could not be parsed in-review (openpyxl unavailable) and cleaning_plan.md does not include explicit spreadsheet cell-level citations for computed values. As a result, formula visibility and end-to-end reproducibility of predicted_sdi, sdi_residual_pct, fouling_index, and priority_score cannot be independently verified.
